description: This is a scatter plot showing displacement in millimetres over a period of 60 days, accompanied by a linear trend line. The Y-axis, labelled "Displacement [mm]", ranges from -30 mm to 10 mm. The X-axis, labelled "Time [days]", ranges from 0 days to 60 days. Individual data points are plotted as blue dots, showing a general downward trend in displacement over time. A green circle highlights the data point at approximately 0 days and 0 mm displacement. A red straight line represents the linear trend, starting at approximately 5 mm displacement at 0 days and decreasing to about -20 mm displacement by 60 days. This indicates a consistent rate of negative displacement or subsidence over the observed period. The annotation "(b)" is visible in the lower-right quadrant of the plot.
